mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_BACKUP_BOOK (MR_ID, MR_USER_ID, MR_BOOK_NAME, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED) SELECT MR_ID, MR_USER_ID, MR_BOOK_NAME, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED FROM FIN_BOOK WHERE MR_ID = #{bookId} AND MR_IS_DELETED = 0
